did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper developed a qualitative and quantitative photographic scale for actinic keratosis using reflectance confocal microscopy (RCM) and dermoscopy. The methodology involved literature research, image acquisition, and manual grading of cellular attributes by researchers to establish a scoring system. There is no mention of using artificial intelligence, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms for image analysis, segmentation, or classification; the 'image analysis' referred to is the manual application of the developed scale.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
